Package com.sportradar.unifiedodds.sdk.internal.caching

Interface DrawCi

All Superinterfaces:
CacheItem, SportEventCi
All Known Implementing Classes:
DrawCiImpl
public interface DrawCi extends SportEventCi
A draw cache representation
